name: Priya Sharma
bio: Cloud architect and DevOps specialist with 6+ years experience designing scalable infrastructure. AWS certified and passionate about automation and continuous integration.
objective: To architect robust, scalable cloud infrastructure solutions that enable businesses to focus on innovation while ensuring security, reliability, and cost efficiency.
aboutHtml:
Priya is a seasoned DevOps engineer who has transformed infrastructure for multiple high-growth startups and enterprises. Her expertise spans AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, and infrastructure-as-code frameworks.

With a passion for automation and continuous improvement, Priya has reduced deployment times by up to 80% and improved system reliability across multiple organizations. She's also an active speaker at tech conferences.

projects.title: Kubernetes Migration for Enterprise
projects.description: Led migration of 50+ microservices from traditional infrastructure to Kubernetes. Achieved 60% cost reduction and improved deployment frequency to 100+ times per day.

projects.title: CI/CD Pipeline for 200+ Services
projects.description: Built comprehensive CI/CD infrastructure handling 200+ services with automated testing, deployment, and rollback capabilities.

projects.title: Advanced Monitoring & Alerting System
projects.description: Implemented centralized monitoring system with predictive alerting. Reduced mean time to recovery (MTTR) by 70%.

sections.title: Summary
sections.content: Results-driven DevOps architect with proven expertise in designing and implementing scalable cloud infrastructure. AWS certified professional with track record of improving deployment frequency and system reliability.

sections.title: Key Achievements
sections.content:
• Architected and deployed Kubernetes cluster serving 1M+ transactions daily
• Reduced deployment time from 2 hours to 15 minutes
• Achieved 99.99% uptime SLA across all services
• Led cost optimization initiatives saving $500K+ annually
• Mentored team of 4 engineers in cloud best practices
